script_text: Two books can be about the same topic.
But they might share different facts!
Let us learn how to compare them.
Book one says: dogs need walks.
Book two says: dogs need exercise.
These books agree! Walks are one kind of exercise.
Book one says: the sun is hot.
Book two says: the sun gives Earth light.
Both books are about the sun!
Reading two books on the same topic gives you more facts than just one!
Now you are ready to compare fact books!
